results.title: China’s new AI Club: What WAICO means for the world
results.description: China has launched the World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization, or WAICO, as part of its push to shape global AI rules. The new body could deepen the divide between Chinese and Western approaches to AI governance.

results.title: France also seeks to ban children from using social networks
results.description: French lawmakers will vote on the 21st of July on a law that would ban social networks for children under 15, joining several countries considering the unpopular move among teenagers, Reuters reports. If passed, France would follow Australia’s example, which banned children from platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, Snapchat, TikTok and YouTube last December. French [...] The post France also seeks to ban children from using social networks appeared first on Baltic News Network .

results.title: Pune: Sub-Registrar Brutally Assaulted Inside Office After Refusing Document Registration - VIDEO
results.description: A sub-registrar was allegedly assaulted inside his office in Pune's Ambegaon after refusing to register a document due to incomplete paperwork, police said.
